Items.Title: 使用 NextJS 13 图像和 Tailwind CSS 创建现代英雄形象 | Creating a Modern Hero Image Using NextJS 13 Images and Tailwind CSS
Items.Description:
在过去，当我们想要一个可以填充整个响应式 div 元素的英雄形象时，我们会使用background-image, background-size, etc... CSS 标签将我们的英雄形象放在英雄前景后面。 多年来，这非常有效！

那是......直到next-image出现。 它在 React 之上提供了额外的抽象和功能，包括带有文件系统路由的内置快速服务器、静态生成的页面和当您在 Vercel（他是 NextJS 的创建者）上托管您的应用程序时自动响应图像优化。 图像优化很棒。 它会自动生成srcset图像并将它们转换为webp 。

所以这一切都很好，但问题是：next-image 不适用于 CSS 定义的背景图像。 通过将 next-image 与一点 Tailwind CSS 结合使用，我们可以创建一个现代英雄组件，它具有完全响应、图像优化和相对面向未来的能力……好吧，至少在接下来的一两周内是这样。 本教程侧重于创建 hero 组件，并且是关于如何使用 NextJS 13 构建完整网站（尚未发布）的更大系列的一部分。 您可以克隆此项目，因为它目前位于此处。 也就是说，我不会介绍如何创建新的 NextJS 13 应用程序的基础知识。

安装顺风 CSS

如果您的应用程序中还没有 Tailwind CSS，让我们安装它：

 npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer npm install react-cool-dimensions npx tailwindcss init

这将安装我们的依赖项并初始化我们的配置文件。 它还安装react-cool-dimensions ，我们将使用它向客户端发送适当大小的图像。

接下来，我们需要编辑几个文件， post.config.css和tailwind.config.css ：

 // postcss.config.js module.exports = { plugins: { tailwindcss: {}, autoprefixer: {}, } }
 // tailwind.config.js /** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config} */ module.exports = { content: [ "./src/pages/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}", "./src/components/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}", ], theme: { extend: { colors: { 'primary': '#29abe3', 'primaryDark': '#3829e3', 'logo': '#edebeb', 'bg1': '#4c05b0', }, }, }, plugins: [], }

并不是说我为我们的主题颜色创建了一些自定义实用程序类。

现在我们要将以下内容添加到全局 CSS 文件的顶部，该文件通常位于./styles/globals.css中：

 @tailwind base; @tailwind components; @tailwind utilities;

创建按钮组件

在创建高阶组件之前，我们首先要创建子组件。 我们的英雄将拥有的唯一组件是一个按钮。 这个例子是一个很好的通用按钮组件，它将根据是否提供href属性来呈现<a>或<button>元素：

 import React from 'react' import Link from 'next/link'; export default function Button(props, { variant = 'primary', children }) { let className = `mt-8 px-12 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-primaryDark` + ' hover:opacity-90 text-xl text-white/90 font-semibold drop-shadow-lg rounded-full'; return props.href ? <Link className={className} {...props} /> : <button type="button" className={className} {...props} /> }

创建我们的英雄组件

现在我们可以创建英雄组件了。 不要被复杂性吓到，我会完整解释：

 import React, { useState } from 'react' import Image from 'next/image' import useDimensions from 'react-cool-dimensions'; import arrayCeil from '../lib/arrayCeil'; import Button from './ui/Button'; export default function Hero() { const [heroImage, setHeroImage] = useState('hero-1920.jpg') const imageSizes = [600, 1280, 1920] const { observe, unobserve, width, height, entry } = useDimensions({ onResize: ({ observe, unobserve, width, height, entry }) => { setHeroImage(`hero-${arrayCeil(imageSizes, width)}.jpg`) unobserve(); // To stop observing the current target element observe(); // To re-start observing the current target element }, }); return ( <div ref={observe} class="w-full h-screen flex justify-center items-center overflow-hidden relative bg-black"> <Image src={`/images/${heroImage}`} alt="Hero Image" className="opacity-60 object-cover" fill /> <div class="flex flex-col justify-center items-center px-3"> <h1 class=" text-center text-3xl md:text-5xl text-white font-bold drop-shadow-lg">WELCOME TO <br /> <span class="text-primary">MY COMPANY</span> </h1> <p class="mt-5 text-center text-lg text-white opacity-90">Making tomorrows widgets today...</p> <Button href="/">Get Started</Button> </div> </div> ) }

所以我们这里有一个图像文件夹，其中包含我们根据视口的最大宽度为我们的英雄创建的图像，我们使用useDimensions()钩子检测到。 每次更改视口宽度时，此挂钩都会触发并使用自定义arrayCeil()函数将新维度四舍五入到维度数组中的下一个最高值。 这使我们能够为我们的英雄提供适当大小和裁剪的图像。

这是arrayCeil()的代码：

 export default function arrayCeil(arr, number) { const sorted = arr.sort((a, b) => a - b); for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { if (arr[i] > number) { return sorted[i]; } } // If no index found return the last element return sorted[sorted.length - 1]; }

非常简单，我们只是循环遍历数组，直到找到与提供的值相比下一个最高元素的索引，然后返回该索引的值。 这应该内置到 JavaScript 中！ 现在npm run dev你的应用程序，希望你能看到这个：

这是手机视图：

好了，这就是本教程的全部内容。 请务必尽快回来查看我即将发布的教程：一个完整​​的 NextJS 13 网站！ 您将能够在Designly 博客中找到该内容以及更多内容。

开个玩笑，这是个人喜好。 但是你可以在你的设置中更改你的主题、字体等。

一旦解除暂停，designly 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，所有帖子都会被故意隐藏起来，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 designly 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

感谢您保护 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 的安全。 以下是您可以设计地标记的方法：

有意地让所有帖子不那么显眼

故意发布违反 DEV 社区 👩‍💻👨‍💻 行为准则的内容，因为它具有骚扰性、攻击性或垃圾内容。

报告其他不当行为

有意地不屈不挠将恢复他们帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

In the old days, when we wanted a hero image that would fill an entire responsive div element, we would use the background-image, background-size, etc... CSS tags to place our hero image behind the hero foreground. And for years this worked great!

That is... until next-image came along. NextJS is a JavaScript framework on top of a framework (React). It provides additional abstraction and functionality on top of React, including a built-in express server with filesystem routes, static generated pages and automatic responsive image optimization when you host your app on Vercel (which is he creator of NextJS). The image optimization is great. It automagically generates srcset images and converts them to webp.

So that's all well and good, but here's the problem: next-image does not work with CSS-defined background images. 😱 But no worries! By using next-image in conjunction with a little Tailwind CSS, we can create a modern hero component that is fully responsive, image-optimized and relatively future-proof... well, at least for the next week or two. 🤣

This tutorial focuses on creating the hero component and is part of a larger series on how to build a complete website using NextJS 13 (yet to be published). You can clone this project as it currently stands here. That being said, I will not be covering the basics of how to create a new NextJS 13 app.

Installing Tailwind CSS

If you don't already have Tailwind CSS in your app, let's get it installed:

npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer
npm install react-cool-dimensions
npx tailwindcss init

This installs our dependencies and initializes our config files. It also installs react-cool-dimensions, which we will use for shipping properly sized images to the client.

Next, we need to edit a couple of files, post.config.css and tailwind.config.css:

// postcss.config.js module.exports = { plugins: { tailwindcss: {}, autoprefixer: {}, }
}

// tailwind.config.js /** @type {import('tailwindcss').Config} */
module.exports = { content: [ "./src/pages/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}", "./src/components/**/*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx}", ], theme: { extend: { colors: { 'primary': '#29abe3', 'primaryDark': '#3829e3', 'logo': '#edebeb', 'bg1': '#4c05b0', }, }, }, plugins: [],
}

Not that I created some custom utility classes for our theme colors.

Now we want to add the following to the top of our global CSS file, which is usually in ./styles/globals.css:

@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

Create a Button Component

We first want to create our child components before we create our higher order component. The only component our hero will have is a button. This example is a nice universal button component that will render either an <a> or <button> element depending on whether or not the href property is supplied:

import React from 'react'
import Link from 'next/link'; export default function Button(props, { variant = 'primary', children }) { let className = `mt-8 px-12 py-3 bg-gradient-to-r from-primary to-primaryDark` + ' hover:opacity-90 text-xl text-white/90 font-semibold drop-shadow-lg rounded-full'; return props.href ? <Link className={className} {...props} />
 : <button type="button" className={className} {...props} />
}

Create Our Hero Component

Now we can create our hero component. Don't be alarmed by the complexity, I will explain in full:

import React, { useState } from 'react'
import Image from 'next/image'
import useDimensions from 'react-cool-dimensions';
import arrayCeil from '../lib/arrayCeil';
import Button from './ui/Button'; export default function Hero() { const [heroImage, setHeroImage] = useState('hero-1920.jpg') const imageSizes = [600, 1280, 1920] const { observe, unobserve, width, height, entry } = useDimensions({ onResize: ({ observe, unobserve, width, height, entry }) => { setHeroImage(`hero-${arrayCeil(imageSizes, width)}.jpg`) unobserve(); // To stop observing the current target element observe(); // To re-start observing the current target element }, }); return ( <div ref={observe} class="w-full h-screen flex justify-center items-center overflow-hidden relative bg-black"> <Image src={`/images/${heroImage}`} alt="Hero Image" className="opacity-60 object-cover" fill /> <div class="flex flex-col justify-center items-center px-3"> <h1 class=" text-center text-3xl md:text-5xl text-white font-bold drop-shadow-lg">WELCOME TO <br /> <span class="text-primary">MY COMPANY</span>
 </h1>
 <p class="mt-5 text-center text-lg text-white opacity-90">Making tomorrows widgets today...</p>
 <Button href="/">Get Started</Button>
 </div>
 </div>
 )
}

So what we have here is an images folder with images we created for our hero based on the viewport's max width, which we detect using the useDimensions() hook. Every time the viewport width is changed, this hook fires and rounds the new dimension up to the next highest value in our array of dimensions using the custom arrayCeil() function. This allows us to serve properly sized and cropped images for our hero.

Here is the code for arrayCeil():

export default function arrayCeil(arr, number) { const sorted = arr.sort((a, b) => a - b); for (let i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) { if (arr[i] > number) { return sorted[i]; } } // If no index found return the last element return sorted[sorted.length - 1];
}

Pretty simple, we just loop through the array until we find the index of the next highest element compared to the supplied value, and then return the value of that index. This should be built in to JavaScript! 😡

Now npm run dev your app and hopefully you see this:

And here's the mobile phone view:

Well, that's all for this tutorial. Be sure to check back soon for my upcoming tutorial: a complete NextJS 13 website! You'll be able to find that and much more at the Designly Blog.

Just kidding, it's a personal preference. But you can change your theme, font, etc. in your settings.

The more you know. 🌈

基本
对象是相关数据和/或功能的集合(MDN)。

属性表示key: value ，其中 key 是一个字符串，也称为“属性名称”。

返回的键是字符串。

这将返回给定对象自己的可枚举字符串键控属性值 (MDN) 的数组。

这将返回给定对象自己的可枚举字符串键属性键值对 (MDN) 的数组。

它以键的数字顺序（升序）返回。

Ayako yk

Posted on Jan 19

While solving LeetCode questions, I noticed I'd not fully understood Object and Array. So, I learned the fundamentals of Object again, and this blog is more like a study note for myself. But I hope it helps some of you who've got stuck with the same problems.

This article includes:

  1. basics
  2. for ... in
  3. hasOwnProperty()
  4. Object.keys(), Object.values(), Object.entries()
  5. forEach

Basics
Object is a collection of related data and/or functionality (MDN).

Property means key: value, where key is a string and also called 'property name.'

We can check if a certain key exists in an object.

for ... in
So, by using key in object along with a for loop, we can get all the keys or values of an object.

hasOwnProperty() Another way to check the existence of a key in an object is hasOwnProperty().

property means key. It returns true or false

*It returns true even when the value is 'undefined' or 'null'.

It is useful for "hash table" questions.

Object.keys()
This returns an array of a given object's own enumerable string-keyed property names (MDN).

It returns in the key's numeric order (ascending).
The returned keys are strings.

Object.values()
This returns an array of a given object's own enumerable string-keyed property values (MDN).

It returns an array in the key's numeric order if the keys are numeric.

Object.entries()
This returns an array of a given object's own enumerable string-keyed property key-value pairs (MDN).

It returns in the key's numeric order (ascending).

forEach
array.forEach(callback)

forEach() iterates over the array items, but if we use Object.keys(), Object.values(), or Object.entries, we can still get values because those return an array.

There're more Object methods, but the above would make it easier to solve coding problems and work with JSON.

 <!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"> <title>How To Get Multiple Checkbox Value In jQuery</title> <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-1.12.4.min.js"></script> </head> <body> <form> <h3>Select languages:</h3> <label><input type="checkbox" value="laravel" name="language"> Laravel </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="php" name="language"> PHP </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="jquery" name="language"> jQuery </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="javascript" name="language"> JavaScript </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="react" name="language"> React </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="angular" name="language"> Angular </label> <label><input type="checkbox" value="python" name="language"> Python </label> <br> <button type="button">Get Selected Values</button> </form> <script> $(document).ready(function() { $("button").click(function(){ var arr = []; $.each($("input[name='language']:checked"), function(){ arr.push($(this).val()); }); alert("Your selected languages are: " + arr.join(", ")); }); }); </script> </body> </html>

In this article, we will see how to get multiple checkbox values in jquery. Here, we will learn to get the selected checkbox values using jquery.

We will use the :checked selector for checkboxes and radio buttons. It can retrieve the selected value of the checkbox.

When clicking on the checkbox we will push the value in the array using the push() function.

So, let's see get selected checkbox values in jquery, multiple checkbox checked values in javascript, and how to get multiple checkbox values in jquery using an array.

Example:

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<title>How To Get Multiple Checkbox Value In jQuery</title>

    <form>
        <h3>Select languages:</h3>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="laravel" name="language"> Laravel </label>

        <label><input type="checkbox" value="jquery" name="language"> jQuery </label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="javascript" name="language"> JavaScript </label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="react" name="language"> React </label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="angular" name="language"> Angular </label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" value="python" name="language"> Python </label>
        <br>
        <button type="button">Get Selected Values</button>
    </form>
  <script>
      $(document).ready(function() {
          $("button").click(function(){
              var arr = [];
              $.each($("input[name='language']:checked"), function(){
                  arr.push($(this).val());
              });
              alert("Your selected languages are: " + arr.join(", "));
          });
      });
  </script>
</body>

您可能已经观察到，每当航班取消或延误时，乘客都会丢弃他们的证件。 然而，这是一个很大的错误，当他们申请延迟赔偿时才意识到。 因此，您需要妥善保管这些文件，以便在需要时使用它们。

  1. 尽量保持冷静：通常，在这些情况下，当人们无法获得达美航班延误补偿时，他们会失去冷静。 因此，建议耐心等待并了解整个情况。 如果你倾听另一方的意见，那会有所帮助，然后你就会了解其他事情。
  2. 找到合适的人：现在，如果你不知道合适的人来讨论延误补偿，你必须面临多重挑战。 但是，最好找到合适的部门和可以帮助您获得退款的相关人员。
  3. 获取航空公司的通知：航空公司会及时通知您有关航班延误、取消和改道的信息。 但是，这些步骤也是为了避免提供延误航班补偿。

多个来源可以帮助你，比如在登机口标志上显示更新，然后是航班信息显示屏。 但是，如果您还跟踪航班状态，将会有所帮助。

  1. 搭乘下一班航班：如果您遇到航班延误、取消和其他操作，您将被预订到下一班航班。 但是，航空公司应该只让您登上另一趟航班。

航空公司还将安排在同一航班上重新安排您的托运行李。 另一方面，连接达美航空 Book A Flight服务台可提供最便宜的航班等等。

  1. 帮助解决过夜延误：有时，航班取消或延误会造成过夜不便。 但达美航空公司从不在中途离开乘客。 但是，航空公司将为您提供酒店住宿。

如果没有任何住宿，它会以高达 100 美元的价格为您提供交通信用。

如何管理航空公司的延误情况？

如果你被航空公司的延误困住了，这取决于达美的延误补偿方案。 如果您选择继续飞行，请申请货币补偿。

另一方面，您也可以与达美航空公司的现场代表交谈，并尝试获取更多相关信息。 每当您需要时，航空公司都会提供解决方案。 此外，其他几项功能让您的旅行更加精彩。

Items.Title: 59.螺旋矩阵II | 59. Spiral Matrix II
Items.Description:
严厉的拉杰帕尔

发表于 1 月 19 日

问题陈述：

给定一个正整数 n，生成一个 nxn 矩阵，其中元素按螺旋顺序从 1 到 n2 填充。

示例 1：
输入： n = 3
输出： [[1,2,3],[8,9,4],[7,6,5]]

示例 2：
输入： n = 1
约束：

解决方案：

算法：

  1. 创建一个大小为 nx n 的矩阵。
  2. 初始化 left = 0, right = n - 1, top = 0, bottom = n - 1, num = 1
  3. 当 left <= right 和 top <= bottom 时迭代。 返回矩阵。

代码：

 public class Solution { public int[][] generateMatrix(int n){ int[][] matrix = new int[n][n]; int left = 0; int right = n - 1; int top = 0; int bottom = n - 1; int num = 1; while(left <= right && top <= bottom){ for(int i = left; i <= right; i++){ matrix[top][i] = num++; } top++; for(int i = top; i <= bottom; i++){ matrix[i][right] = num++; } right--; for(int i = right; i >= left; i--){ matrix[bottom][i] = num++; } bottom--; for(int i = bottom; i >= top; i--){ matrix[i][left] = num++; } left++; } } }

空间复杂度：

Problem Statement:

Given a positive integer n, generate an n x n matrix filled with elements from 1 to n2 in spiral order.

Example 1:
Input: n = 3
Output: [[1,2,3],[8,9,4],[7,6,5]]

Example 2:
Input: n = 1
*Output: *[[1]]

Constraints:

Solution:

Algorithm:

  1. Create a matrix of size n x n.
  2. Initialize left = 0, right = n - 1, top = 0, bottom = n - 1, num = 1
  3. Iterate while left <= right and top <= bottom. a) Iterate from left to right and fill the top row with num. b) Increment top. c) Iterate from top to bottom and fill the right column with num. d) Decrement right. e) Iterate from right to left and fill the bottom row with num. f) Decrement bottom. g) Iterate from bottom to top and fill the left column with num. h) Increment left.
  4. Return matrix.

Code:

public class Solution {
    public int[][] generateMatrix(int n){
        int[][] matrix = new int[n][n];
        int left = 0;
        int right = n - 1;
        int top = 0;
        int bottom = n - 1;
        int num = 1;
        while(left <= right && top <= bottom){
            for(int i = left; i <= right; i++){
                matrix[top][i] = num++;
            }
            top++;
            for(int i = top; i <= bottom; i++){
                matrix[i][right] = num++;
            }
            right--;
            for(int i = right; i >= left; i--){
                matrix[bottom][i] = num++;
            }
            bottom--;
            for(int i = bottom; i >= top; i--){
                matrix[i][left] = num++;
            }
            left++;
        }
    }
}

Time Complexity:
O(N^2)

Space Complexity:
O(N^2)
